title: HelpGUI
description: An intuitive, easy to configure help GUI plugin for paper.
body:
HelpGUI replaces the default Minecraft /help command with a clean, clickable GUI designed for modern servers.
Instead of scrolling through chat, players can view available commands in an intuitive menu and run them instantly with a single click.

![Simple Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d1335fc8bf74e2462b9eedb7c08d29d4e065beb_0.webp)

Everything is fully configurable through config.yml, including the GUI title, size, item layout, lore, and executed commands.
Each item can optionally close the menu after use, making it easy to create simple command shortcuts or detailed help menus.


HelpGUI is lightweight, dependency-free, and designed to be easy to customize while staying fast and reliable.
